ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typical_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the parameter */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the parameter */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Measurement range of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES parameter_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition type */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES condition_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the measurement belongs to */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
